title: Music Ministry Practice Sessions

title: The Lord's Day

description: How to continue growing in our relationship with the Holy Spirit.

description: A powerful gathering of our chapter in prayer and fellowship. Anchored Verse: John 20:21-22

description: Understanding the role and power of the Holy Spirit in our lives.
